name: Enzacamene
description: Enzacamene is also known as 4-methylbenzylidene-camphor (4-MBC). It is an organic camphor derivative and UV-B ray filter. It is used in cosmetic products such as sunscreen to provide skin protection against UV rays. Its effects on the human reproductive system as an endocrine disruptor are being investigated. Its use in cosmetic products is not approved by the FDA, however is approved by the Health Canada.
